use_cases: Landing page hero sections with immersive depth effects
Product showcases with interactive mouse-following parallax
Marketing pages requiring visual depth without heavy 3D libraries
Portfolio or creative agency headers with layered elements
SaaS landing pages seeking modern parallax hero aesthetics
ai_summary: A layered parallax hero component featuring multiple depth layers with 3D transforms that respond to mouse movement. Uses CSS perspective and translateZ for depth, creating an immersive scrolling effect. The component tracks mouse position to offset each layer at different rates, producing a dynamic 3D parallax illusion with geometric shapes and gradient blur effects.
